baseline.scope_note: goHwpTxt is excluded from readiness scoring because it is a local replace of an external HWP/HWPX parser package.

category_g_agent_outcome_evidence.finding: agent eval / benchmark directory and result files were absent before this baseline

representative_tasks.description: Update Codex-facing docs such as AGENTS.md or module context files

parser tests or documented platform limitation
